title: device.token.rotate could mint scopes broader than caller held
description: The rotateDeviceToken function in device-pairing.ts accepts arbitrary scopes from the caller without checking whether the requested scopes exceed the device's originally approved scope baseline. A device with operator.read can call rotate with scopes=['operator.admin'] and receive a new token with elevated privileges, because the function blindly applies the requested scopes to the new token and updates device.scopes without any scope containment validation.
